name: pr_cep_not_int_block_adv
drl: rule NE when $a : A() not B(this after[60ms,80ms] $a) then end
comment: interval not: A@100 dur30 => window shifts, B@200 lands IN it (eval_allen +duration) so A is BLOCKED — inert even after advance. — graduated D-134 (§3B temporal-not firing-deferral port landed): the not-wall is down, engine==oracle. Was an engine_fenced recon witness.
